name: font.mono
value: ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, monospace
description: HUD / code: system UI mono first, then common dev fonts, generic fallback. Use with `code`, `pre`, and monospace readouts.

name: font.sans
description: Base UI: Oxanium (wght 200–800) + generic sans; self-host variable TTF under /assets/ + @font-face in globals.css (CSP-safe).
